name: @firstpick/pi-skill-performance-optimizer
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for slow code, high CPU/memory, latency, large data processing, algorithmic complexity, profiling plans, benchmarks, or optimization requests. Profiles first and weighs trade-offs before changing code.
description_zh: 代理应在处理慢代码、高 CPU/内存、延迟、大数据处理、算法复杂度、分析计划、基准测试或优化请求时调用此技能。首先分析并在更改代码之前权衡权衡
